name: I'll be Your Very Own Monster
descriptionTemplate: Saya's Exalt Base Shield generation +5%, and the Base {Corrosion} inflicted by {Viscera Blossoms} +10%. For every 1% Sigil Yield provided by Saya herself, her equipped Wheel of Destiny, and Covenants, Saya's Exalt Base Shield generation additionally +0.25%, and the Base {Corrosion} inflicted by {Viscera Blossoms} additionally +0.5%.
